scripts.build:mobile: CAPACITOR_BUILD=true next build && npx cap sync
scripts.android:debug: CAPACITOR_BUILD=true next build && npx cap copy android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release:bundle: CAPACITOR_BUILD=true next build && npx cap copy android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.android:release:apk: CAPACITOR_BUILD=true next build && npx cap copy android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:release: npm run android:release:bundle && npm run android:release:apk
scripts.rc:android: npm run android:debug && echo '--- Release artifacts ---' && npm run android:release
